templates.template: Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active
templates.name: Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active
templates.description:
This template is designed to monitor internal Zabbix metrics on the remote Zabbix proxy via the active Zabbix agent.

Specify the address of the remote Zabbix proxy by changing the {$ZABBIX.PROXY.ADDRESS} and {$ZABBIX.PROXY.PORT} macros. Don't forget to adjust the "StatsAllowedIP" parameter in the remote proxy's configuration file to allow the collection of statistics.

Generated by official Zabbix template tool "Templator"
templates.readme:
## Overview

This template is designed to monitor internal Zabbix metrics on the remote Zabbix proxy via the active Zabbix agent.

## Setup

Specify the address of the remote Zabbix proxy as the values for the `Zabbix proxy Address` and `Zabbix proxy Port` configuration fields. Don't forget to adjust the `StatsAllowedIP` parameter in the remote proxy's configuration file to allow the collection of statistics.

items.name: Discovery queue
items.description: The count of values enqueued in the discovery queue.

preprocessing.error_handler_params: No "discoverer" processes started. Please check "StartDiscoverers" parameter in the server configuration file.

items.name: Preprocessing queue
items.description: The number of values enqueued in the preprocessing queue.

items.name: Preprocessing direct throughput
items.description: Reflects the direct throughput of the preprocessing.

items.name: Preprocessing queued throughput
items.description: Reflects the queued throughput of the preprocessing.

items.name: Preprocessing direct VPS
items.description: Reflects the count of direct preprocessing values per second.

items.name: Preprocessing queued VPS
items.description: Reflects the count of queued preprocessing values per second.

items.name: Utilization of agent poller data collector processes, in %
items.description: The average percentage of the time during which the agent poller processes have been busy for the last minute.

triggers.expression: avg(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/process.agent_poller.avg.busy,10m)>{$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"agent poller"}
triggers.recovery_expression: avg(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/process.agent_poller.avg.busy,10m)<{$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MIN:"agent poller"}
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Utilization of agent poller processes is high
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: Utilization of agent poller processes over {$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"agent poller"}%
triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the agent poller, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Utilization of availability manager processes is high

triggers.description: Indicates potential performance issues with the availability manager, which may affect monitoring efficiency and response times.

items.name: Proxy memory buffer, % used
items.description:
Statistics and availability of Zabbix proxy memory buffer usage statistics. Percentage of used proxy memory buffer.
Proxy memory buffer is used to store the new historical data and upload from it without accessing database.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/proxy_buffer.buffer.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"proxy buffer"}
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Excessive proxy memory buffer usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: More than {$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"proxy buffer"}% used in the proxy memory buffer
triggers.description: Consider increasing ProxyMemoryBufferSize in the zabbix_proxy.conf configuration file.

items.name: Proxy buffer, state changes
items.description: The number of state changes between disk/memory buffer modes since proxy start.

items.name: Proxy buffer, state
Zabbix proxy check
items.description: Flag indicating whether it is a proxy or not.

triggers.expression: last(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/proxy_check)=1
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Wrong template assigned
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: Zabbix proxy template is assigned to Zabbix server
triggers.description: Check that the template has been selected correctly.

items.name: Configuration cache, % used
items.description: The availability statistics of Zabbix configuration cache. The percentage of used data buffer.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/rcache.buffer.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"configuration cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Excessive configuration cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: More than {$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"configuration cache"}% used in the configuration cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `CacheSize` in the `zabbix_proxy.conf` configuration file.

triggers.expression: nodata(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/rcache.buffer.pused,{$ZABBIX.PROXY.NODATA_TIMEOUT})=1
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Failed to fetch stats data
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: Failed to fetch stats data (or no data for {$ZABBIX.PROXY.NODATA_TIMEOUT})
triggers.description: Zabbix has not received statistics data for `{$ZABBIX.PROXY.NODATA_TIMEOUT}`.

items.name: Required VPS
items.description: The required performance of a proxy (the number of values that need to be collected per second).

items.name: Uptime
items.description: Uptime of the Zabbix proxy process in seconds.

triggers.expression: last(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/uptime)<10m
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: {HOST.NAME} has been restarted
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: {HOST.NAME} has been restarted (uptime < 10m)
triggers.description: Uptime is less than 10 minutes.

items.name: Version
items.description: The version of Zabbix proxy.

triggers.expression: last(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/version,#1)<>last(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/version,#2) and length(last(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/version))>0
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Version has changed
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: Version has changed (new version: {ITEM.VALUE})
triggers.description: Zabbix proxy version has changed. Acknowledge to close the problem manually.

items.name: VMware cache, % used
items.description: The availability statistics of Zabbix vmware cache. The percentage of used data buffer.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/vmware.buffer.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"vmware cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Excessive vmware cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: More than {$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"vmware cache"}% used in the vmware cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `VMwareCacheSize` in the `zabbix_proxy.conf` configuration file.

items.name: History write cache, % used
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache. The percentage of used history buffer.
The history cache is used to store item values. A high number indicates database performance problems.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/wcache.history.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"history cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Excessive history cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: More than {$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"history cache"}% used in the history cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `HistoryCacheSize` in the `zabbix_proxy.conf` configuration file.

items.name: History index cache, % used
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache. The percentage of used history index buffer.
The history index cache is used to index values stored in the history cache.

triggers.expression: max(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/wcache.index.pused,10m)>{$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"index cache"}
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: Excessive history index cache usage
triggers.event_name: Zabbix proxy: More than {$ZABBIX.PROXY.UTIL.MAX:"index cache"}% used in the history index cache
triggers.description: Consider increasing `HistoryIndexCacheSize` in the `zabbix_proxy.conf` configuration file.

items.name: Number of processed values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The total number of values processed by Zabbix server or Zabbix proxy, except unsupported items.

items.name: Number of processed numeric (float) values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed numeric (float) values.

items.name: Number of processed log values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed log values.

items.name: Number of processed not supported values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of times the item processing resulted in an item becoming unsupported or remaining in that state.

items.name: Number of processed character values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed character values.

items.name: Number of processed text values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed text values.

items.name: Number of processed numeric (unsigned) values per second
items.description:
The statistics and availability of Zabbix write cache.
The number of processed numeric (unsigned) values.

items.name: Queue over 10 minutes
items.description: The number of monitored items in the queue that are delayed by at least 10 minutes.

triggers.expression: min(/Zabbix proxy health by Zabbix agent active/zabbix.stats[{$ZABBIX.PROXY.ADDRESS},{$ZABBIX.PROXY.PORT},queue,10m],10m)>100
triggers.name: Zabbix proxy: More than 100 items have been missing data for over 10 minutes
triggers.description: Indicates potential issues with network connectivity, agent failures, or unresponsive monitored resources that require attention.

items.name: Queue
items.description: The number of monitored items in the queue that are delayed by at least 6 seconds.

items.name: Zabbix stats
items.description: The master item of Zabbix proxy statistics.

macros.description: IP/DNS of the remote Zabbix proxy (default is 127.0.0.1).

config.label: Zabbix proxy Address
config.description: IP or DNS of the remote Zabbix proxy that should be monitored via the Zabbix agent.

macros.description: The time threshold after which statistics are considered unavailable. Used in trigger expressions.

config.label: Time since the last statistic was received
config.description: Threshold value of time since the last statistic was received from the remote proxy.

macros.description: Port of the remote Zabbix proxy (default is 10051).

config.label: Zabbix proxy Port
config.description: Port of the remote Zabbix proxy that should be monitored via the Zabbix agent. In the range from 1 to 65535 inclusive.

macros.description: Default maximum threshold for percentage utilization triggers (use macro context for specification).

config.label: Maximum process utilization percentage
config.description: Default maximum threshold for process utilization triggers. In the range from 0 to 100 inclusive.

macros.description: Default minimum threshold for percentage utilization triggers (use macro context for specification).

config.label: Minimum process utilization percentage
config.description: Default minimum threshold for process utilization triggers. In the range from 0 to 100 inclusive.
